title: REST API v2 - list of images - mandatory Created attribute

comments.body:
@psakar Thanks for the PR.

You need to sign your PRs

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

We also would prefer some more explanation in the check in message.

There is some debate going on whether the clients should handle omitted entries from the json file messages.  But this LGTM
@jwhonce @baude @mheon PTAL
signed. Added explanation to commit message
Lint, does not like your change, I think you just remove the json flag altogether.
squashed and formatted (though it is a bit surprising for me that lines before change are reformatted)

LGTM
@psakar I concur, I don't understand that change from gofmt either.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *psakar*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
